actuals.note: No history.json found — actuals not available yet. Log activities to data/history.json to enable week-over-week tracking.

recommendation.summary: Ann Arbor is under an Extreme Heat Warning all week (heat index 105–109°F Mon–Thu) — all outdoor workouts move indoors to the YMCA, which is the right call anyway. Two time-sensitive professional items: GovAI U.S. AI Policy Program application closes July 5, and WPC 2026 CFP closes July 5. Culture highlight is the Ann Arbor Art Fair July 16–17, the biggest event of the stay.

suggested.title: YMCA indoor gym or pool — mandatory this week given Extreme Heat Warning (heat index 105–109°F Mon–Thu, storms Fri–Sun)
GovAI U.S. AI Policy Program — application deadline July 5 (6 days). Free 12-week bipartisan AI policy program.
Ann Arbor Art Fair — July 16–17, free, 30 city blocks, nearly 1,000 juried artists. Capstone event of the Ann Arbor stay.
